标题: Off-white quick-drying ice silk sports and leisure shorts. Highly recommended designer style! These shorts are made of soft material, keeping you cool and comfortable even in hot summer days. The fabric is lightweight, durable, super silky, and super stretchy! They are really stylish and comfortable to wear! Available in a variety of colors, suitable for any occasion, whether it's hiking, going to the beach, or strolling in the city. The king of outdoor versatility. Let you dress as you like! Colors: Black, Gray. Sizes: S-XL.
